ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(Quote_Stage__c), ISPICKVAL(Quote_Stage__c, "Finalize OSA"),
NOT( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Bill_To_Address__c)), ISPICKVAL(Bill_To_Address__r.Status__c, "Verification Approved"),
NOT(ISBLANK(Ship_To_Address__c)), ISPICKVAL(Ship_To_Address__r.Status__c, "Verification Approved") ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please check the billing and shipping address of the account
